passive.name: Phenomenal Evil Power
passive.description: Veigar is the greatest Evil to ever strike at the hearts of Runeterra - and he's only getting bigger! Striking an enemy Champion with a spell or scoring a takedown grants Veigar permanently increased Ability Power.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Veigar}} generates a stack of ''Phenomenal Evil'' for each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit by his abilities, and more stacks when he scores an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Phenomenal Evil:}} For each stack, '''Veigar''' gains {{as|{{sti|ability power}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Veigar''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Phenomenal Evil'' for each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit by his [[champion ability|abilities]], and 5 stacks whenever he scores an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Phenomenal Evil:}} For each stack, '''Veigar''' gains {{sti|AP|{{as|1 ability power}}}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The two effects stack, granting 6 stacks for each enemy champion taken down by an ability, 7 with {{ai|Baleful Strike|Veigar}}.
* '''Veigar's''' abilities do not have to deal damage nor affect their targets to grant a stack.

Q.name: Baleful Strike
Q.description: Veigar unleashes a bolt of dark energy that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit. Units killed by this bolt grant Veigar some ability power permanently.
Q.tooltip:
Veigar unleashes a bolt of dark energy, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to the first two enemies hit.

If Veigar kills an enemy with this Ability, he gains {{ spell.veigarpassive:dqkillstacks }} stack of Phenomenal Evil. Large minions and large monsters grant {{ spell.veigarpassive:dqkillstackslarge }} stacks instead.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Veigar}} blasts a dark bolt in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first two enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this kills an enemy, it generates a stack of ''{{ai|Phenomenal Evil Power|Veigar|Phenomenal Evil}}''. Large {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}} generate more stacks.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Veigar''' blasts a dark bolt in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first two enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: If this kills an enemy, it generates 1 stack of ''{{ai|Phenomenal Evil Power|Veigar|Phenomenal Evil}}'', tripled against large {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Killing two enemy champions with ''Baleful Strike'' grants {{tt|{{as|+14 AP}}|+12 from Phenomenal Evil Power and +2 from Baleful Strike}}.
* ''Baleful Strike'' will only grant stacks of {{ai|Phenomenal Evil Power|Veigar|Phenomenal Evil}} from its bolt, and not any additional effect that would kill other units from the same cast.
* The stacks are added immediately on enemy kill (on next game tick).
**If the first target was killed, the second hit may deal 1 damage more on enemies further along the missile's flight path.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Dark Matter
W.description: Veigar calls a great mass of dark matter to fall from the sky to the target location, dealing magic damage when it lands. Stacks of Phenomenal Evil reduce Dark Matter's cooldown.
W.tooltip:
Veigar summons dark matter from the sky, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.

Every {{ spell.veigarpassive:pstacksperdarkmattercdr }} stacks of Phenomenal Evil reduce this Ability's Cooldown by {{ spell.veigarpassive:darkmattercdrincrement*100 }}%.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Veigar}} casts down a mass of dark matter that strikes the target location after a brief delay, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} based on stacks of ''{{ai|Phenomenal Evil Power|Veigar|Phenomenal Evil}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Veigar''' casts down a mass of dark matter that strikes the target location after a {{rutngt|1.2}} {{tt|delay|from the start of the cast time}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Dark Matter's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced based on stacks of ''{{ai|Phenomenal Evil Power|Veigar|Phenomenal Evil}}''.
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{pp|type=[[File:Phenomenal_Evil_Power.png|20px|link=Veigar#Phenomenal_Evil_Power]] [[Veigar#Phenomenal_Evil_Power|Phenomenal Evil]] stacks|8*0.9^(x-1);...;0|0 to 900 for 19;...;∞|formula=8 * 0.9^N. ''N{{equals}}Number of times that 50 Phenomenal Evil stacks are earned.''}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The delay starts at the beginning of the cast time.
** If '''Veigar''' dies during the cast time, ''Dark Matter'' will still successfully fall from the sky.
* ''Dark Matter'' grants {{tip|sight}} of the area during the delay.

E.name: Event Horizon
E.description: Veigar twists the edges of space, creating a cage that Stuns enemies that pass through.
E.tooltip: Veigar twists the edges of space, creating a cage that Stuns enemies that pass through for {{ e1 }} seconds. The cage lasts for 3 seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} After a brief delay, {{ci|Veigar}} erects a cage at the target location that lasts for a short time. Enemies that touch the cage edges are briefly {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} and {{tip|stun|stunned}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Veigar''' forms a cage at the target location that erects after a {{fd|0.5}} second delay, remaining there for 3 seconds. Enemies that collide with the edges of the cage are {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}} and {{tip|stun|stunned}} for a duration.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Event Horizon'' can affect enemies only once per cast.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|400|Outer radius}} / {{tt|250|Safe zone radius}} / {{tt|390|Assist marker radius}}
wiki_detail.spelleffects:
|notes        = 
* The stun and the knockdown are applied to units that are within a certain distance interval from the center of the area of effect.
* An enemy can be affected by ''Event Horizon'' only once every {{fd|4.5}} seconds.
* Units that negate the stun will still count as passing through the edges. They will become immune to the effects of ''Event Horizon'' for the period even after negating them.
* {{tip|Displacement immune}} enemies will still be {{tip|stun|stunned}}, but not {{tip|knockdown|knocked down}}.
* At the start of the cast time, all enemy {{tip|champions}} in a 390-radius become marked for '''Veigar''' to gain an {{tip|takedown|assist}} on them should they perish within the standard 10 seconds assist time.
* ''Event Horizon'' may fail to catch enemies that move very quickly through the boundary distance.
** More modern area checks such as {{cai|The Box|Thresh}} or {{cai|Yordle Snap Trap|Caitlyn}} do not have this issue.

R.name: Primordial Burst
R.description: Blasts target enemy champion, dealing a large amount of magic damage, increasing based on the target's missing health.
R.tooltip: Veigar blasts an enemy champion with primal magic to deal between {{ mindamage }} and {{ maxdamage }} magic damage, increasing with the target's missing Health. Damage is maximized against enemies below 33% Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Veigar}} sends a primordial burst at the target enemy champion that deals {{as|magic damage}} based on {{as|their '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Veigar''' sends a primordial burst at the target enemy champion that deals {{as|magic damage}}, increased by {{as|{{pp|type=target's '''missing''' health|key=%|0 to 100 for 11|key1=%|0 to 100*2/3|formula=1.5% per 1% of target's '''missing''' health. ''This is capped at 66.66% '''missing''' health.''}}|health}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Minimum Magic Damage|{{ap|175 to 325}} {{as|(+ {{ap|65 to 75}}% AP)}}|Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|175*2 to 325*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|65*2 to 75*2}}% AP)}}}}
